name: Safety and tolerability in diabetic kidney disease D+Q pilot
summary: Abstract-located safety extraction boundary for the open-label diabetic kidney disease pilot of a 3-day dasatinib plus quercetin course.
measurement_method: PubMed abstract review for adverse-event reporting and treatment-exposure context
timepoint: 3-day D+Q course with assessment 11 days after treatment completion

provenance.locator: PubMed PMID 31542391 abstract METHODS and FINDINGS
provenance.note: PubMed EFetch abstract snapshot supplies N=9, D+Q dose, and assessment timing but does not report adverse-event counts or serious-adverse-event outcomes in the retained abstract summary.
